name: Ayushman Bharat (PM-JAY)
benefit: Free health insurance up to ₹5,00,000 per family per year
benefit_hindi: ₹5 lakh tak ka free ilaaj har saal, poore parivaar ke liye

eligibility.description: Families identified in SECC 2011 database — rural and urban poor
eligibility.description_hindi: SECC 2011 list mein naam hona chahiye — gaon aur shahar ke garib parivaar
criteria: Family must be in SECC 2011 database
Rural: kaccha house, no adult earning member, SC/ST, landless laborers
Urban: ragpickers, street vendors, domestic workers, construction workers
No age limit, no family size limit
exclusions: Those with government health insurance already

steps: Visit nearest Ayushman Mitra at empanelled hospital
Get Ayushman card generated on the spot
Use card at any empanelled hospital for free treatment
steps_hindi: Nearest government hospital mein Ayushman Mitra se milein
Card dikha kar kisi bhi listed hospital mein free ilaaj karwayein

hindi_summary: Ayushman Bharat mein garib parivaar ko saal mein 5 lakh rupaye tak ka free ilaaj milta hai. Ye scheme SECC 2011 list ke logon ke liye hai. Eligibility check karne ke liye 14555 par call karein ya mera.pmjay.gov.in par jaayein. Aadhaar aur Ration card se Ayushman card ban jaata hai.
